task_completion.description: Verify that a new master work order was created with the exact description 'Master Ticket: Summer Gala Coordination'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint work order list or detail view, there is a ticket with the description 'Master Ticket: Summer Gala Coordination'. Note the system-generated CODE for this ticket to verify subsequent steps.

task_completion.description: Verify that the newly created master ticket has its priority set to 'High'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail view or data grid for the 'Master Ticket: Summer Gala Coordination' ticket shows 'High' in the priority column or field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the active work orders with 'Gala' in their description have been updated to append the parent link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work order list shows tickets (e.g., 'Gala - Ballroom Chair Setup', 'Gala - HVAC Temp Adjust', 'Gala - Post-Event Cleaning') with their descriptions ending in ' | Parent: {CODE}', where {CODE} is the actual code of the master ticket.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ticket containing the trap keyword 'Galactic' was NOT modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket with 'Galactic' in its description (e.g., 'Galactic Server Maintenance') does NOT have the ' | Parent: {CODE}' text appended to it.

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed ticket was NOT modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket marked with '[COMPLETED]' in its description does NOT have the ' | Parent: {CODE}' text appended to it.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMaint web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenMaint UI (CMDBuild framework) in a web browser. The agent did not use terminal commands, curl, or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the tickets in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The appended text ' | Parent: {CODE}' appears inside the actual OpenMaint data grids or forms, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual generated CODE from the master ticket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The appended text uses a real system-generated code (e.g., ' | Parent: WO-000123') rather than the literal placeholder string '{CODE}'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a master ticket with description 'Master Ticket: Summer Gala Coordination' and 'High' priority. The agent must append ' | Parent: {CODE}' (where {CODE} is the actual generated code of the master ticket) to 3 active tickets containing 'Gala'. The agent must NOT modify the trap ticket containing 'Galactic' (e.g., 'Galactic Server Maintenance') or the trap ticket marked as '[COMPLETED]'.
